assessment_objectives.objective: reasonable consumer expectations are defined for what is necessary and proportionate for collecting, receiving, processing, storage, transmission, sharing, updating and/or disposal of Personal Data (PD).

organization-specific practices are defined to limit the collection, receiving, processing, storage, transmission, sharing, updating and/or disposal of Personal Data (PD) according to reasonable consumer expectations for what is necessary and proportionate.

the collection, receiving, processing, storage, transmission, sharing, updating and/or disposal of Personal Data (PD) is limited to reasonable consumer expectations for what is necessary and proportionate.
